headline: Abbott Labs Vs. Danaher: Abbott’s Everyday Products Beat Danaher’s Slumping Biotech Equipment
summary: Abbott and Danaher both reported Q1 2026 results, but the businesses underneath those numbers point in opposite directions, and choosing the wrong one right now costs more than just a few percentage points of return.

headline: Jim Cramer on Danaher: “I Don’t Want You Anywhere Near That One”
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed during Mad Money, as he called the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance a threat to the bull market. headline: Qiagen M&A Fever Builds: KKR, EQT, Advent Explore Possible Takeover
summary: Private equity giants circle Qiagen (QGEN) with potential bids of $50/share. Get the details on the molecular diagnostics buyout.
